model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=0.1)","old":"criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Add light label smoothing to improve generalization under the short fixed-step budget without changing the training loop or model complexity.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DEPTH = 3","old":"DEPTH = 2","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()","old":"criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=0.1)","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase depth and width moderately to raise feature quality within the same fixed-step budget, while removing the label smoothing change that regressed validation loss.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 3e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Use the fixed 256-step budget to cover substantially more training examples by doubling batch size, with a modest learning-rate increase to keep optimization progress per step strong.","secondary_modes":["topk","summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 4e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 3e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The larger-batch run improved sharply, which suggests the current setup is still optimization-limited; a modest additional learning-rate increase is a cheap next probe.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 20","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 96","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The current run still benefits from stronger optimization, so a modest width increase in both the convolutional trunk and the classifier head is a clean next capacity probe without changing the training recipe.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DEPTH = 4","old":"DEPTH = 3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The current wider model is working well, so the next clean capacity probe is one more convolution-pooling stage to improve hierarchical features while keeping the optimizer recipe unchanged.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 24","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 20","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The depth increase produced another strong gain, so the next clean probe is a modest additional width increase while keeping the now-effective 4-stage training recipe intact.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 20","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 24","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 2e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Undo the over-width change and test a slightly lighter regularization level on the stronger 4-stage model, since reduced weight decay has helped this run more than extra trunk width.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 2e-4","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Restore the better weight decay level and test light dropout on the deeper, stronger model to regularize the larger head and later conv blocks without changing the optimizer or depth.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 128","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 96","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Remove the clearly harmful dropout and test a slightly larger classifier head instead, since the stronger 4-stage trunk appears under-regularized but not obviously overfitted.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 4e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The shorter AdamW timescale improved the run, so the next cheap probe is a modest learning-rate increase to exploit that more responsive optimizer within the same 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 4e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 192","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Back off the overly aggressive learning rate and test a slightly smaller batch so the fixed 256-step budget is closer to one full pass over the dataset, which may improve the optimization/generalization tradeoff.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 192","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.85, 0.99)","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Restore the better batch size and test slightly lower AdamW momentum so the optimizer can react faster over the short fixed-step run without changing the successful overall recipe.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.85, 0.98)","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.85, 0.99)","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"The strong gain from lowering AdamW momentum suggests the short fixed-step run benefits from faster optimizer adaptation, so the next low-risk probe is a slightly shorter second-moment timescale as well.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.8, 0.98)","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.85, 0.98)","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"The last two improvements both came from making AdamW adapt faster within the short horizon, so the final probe is one more small reduction in first-moment inertia while keeping the rest of the best recipe fixed.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}
